name: Copper Finch Express
concept: Compact urban coffee and toast bar that should feel calm and premium, but the promotional layer keeps pushing it toward loud campaign messaging.
audience: Morning commuters and office workers who need fast scanning and low-friction ordering.
locationContext: Office district lobby kiosk with portrait screens.
brandStory: A restrained coffee concept that loses clarity when too many promotions and conflicting creative styles are layered on top.
